tool_args.label: Bx6 Select Bus Service

payload.description: Transit and safety improvements to the Bx6 crosstown corridor serving the South Bronx and Upper Manhattan, including bus lanes, boarding islands, off-board fare payment, and real-time bus arrival information

evidence_refs.source_quote: The Bx6 is an important interborough route serving the South Bronx and Upper Manhattan. In Fall 2015, NYC DOT and MTA New York City Transit (MTA) began planning transit and safety improvements to this vital crosstown corridor.
Phase Fall 2015 ... Planning / Design ... SERVICE STARTS

tool_args.label: Off-board fare payment

payload.description: Off-board fare payment allows riders to pay for the bus before boarding. Riders may then board the bus through any door, without needing to show the ticket to the bus operator. MTA employs inspectors to randomly check passenger tickets on the bus.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Off-board fare payment allows riders to pay for the bus before boarding. Riders may then board the bus through any door, without needing to show the ticket to the bus operator. This substantially shortens the time the bus is stopped at the bus stop. MTA employs inspectors to randomly check passenger tickets on the bus.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer
